game_name: Street Fighter II Turbo: Hyper Fighting

special_mechanics.name: Mid-air Hurricane Kick

special_mechanics.name: Yoga Teleport

feel_descriptors: faster playing speed compared to Champion Edition
requires more precise timing for inputs
tier_notes: Tier 1 - empirical/qualitative data only. Source documentation focuses on gameplay features and release information rather than precise physics parameters. No quantitative movement, gravity, or jump physics values documented.
